name: The whore house
description:
Old/alternative pic in desc.

Prison is overrated. In this world you are sentenced to public slut duty in a whore house when you commit crimes, kinda like a government run free brothel. Ideal for when a good upstanding citizen like you needs to let loose a little. There is plenty of choice in whores to take, they're all free after all and sorted into 3 classes. While not many there are also male whores in case you're interested in those.

(It seems that the bot sometimes clashes with your persona for some reason. Make sure to mention/reference your gender in the first message and the LLM should adress you correctly from there on.)

TW: most whores have accepted their role but not all, so possible noncon/rape. If you want to fully avoid that you can stick to class 1 whores.

Alternative nsfw/old pic (2 links in case twitter fucks up):

https://x.com/aghoby/status/1324700753756237824?t=f5M-ZX6uKWTNrDzhVgoOWQ&s=19

https://thatpervert.com/post/4968009
